    Application Submission To LMPC

    Grant of LMPC License

    What Are The Documents Required For LMPC Registration?

    • Importer Exporter Code (IEC)( If an importer )
    • GST Registration Certificate
    • Identity & Address Proof
    • Label of product
    • Applicant’s Aadhar Number/ Authorized Signatory
    • List of products
    Apply For LMPC Registration Now!

    Frequently Asked Questions

    • What is Legal Metrology?

      Legal metrology registration or certification is required for any type of packed commodity that is to be sold in open market, there are different proceedures in legal metrology cerification in which some may or may not require the testing of your products.

    • What are Pre-Packaged Goods?

      A Pre-packaged good is any commodity that, without the purchaser present, is available for purchase in a package of any nature, irrespective of whether sealed or not and contains a predetermined quantity of product. Examples of Pre-packaged commodities include baby food, fuel, food products, cables, chemicals, weighing scales, thermometers, etc.

    • What is an LMPC certificate for importers?

      Importers that work with pre-packaged goods for sale and distribution need to apply to the Director of Legal Metrology in the Central Government Once the application is accepted, the registering authority (Director/ Controller of Legal Metrology) registers the importer’s name and address and grants them an LMPC certificate which is acceptable PAN India.

    • What is an LMPC certificate?

      An LMPC certificate is required for all importers and Indian manufacturers of pre-packaged goods under the 2011 legal metrology guidelines for packaged goods and the 2009 legal metrology legislation. It makes imports simpler and provides transparency for all information relating to the commodities and makes the products standardized as there are guidelines about the MRP labels that are to be followed. It makes the product carry the details that must be present to educate the consumer about the product.
